allow_major_version_upgrade.description: Indicates whether major version upgrades are allowed, which may involve significant changes to the database engine.

apply_immediately.description: Determines whether modifications are applied immediately or during the next maintenance window.

availability_zones.description: Specifies the availability zones where the cluster's instances will be created. Must be valid zones for the selected region.

backup_retention_period.description: The number of days to retain automated backups. Must be a positive integer.

cluster_identifier.description: A unique identifier for the cluster. Must be unique within the account and region.

cluster_identifier_prefix.description: A prefix for the cluster identifier. The final identifier will include a random suffix.

copy_tags_to_snapshot.description: Specifies whether tags assigned to the cluster are copied to snapshots.

deletion_protection.description: Prevents the cluster from being deleted accidentally when enabled.

enable_cloudwatch_logs_exports.description: A list of log types to export to CloudWatch Logs. Supported types depend on the database engine.

engine.description: Specifies the database engine to use for the cluster (e.g., neptune).

engine_version.description: The version of the database engine to use. Must be compatible with the selected engine.

final_snapshot_identifier.description: The identifier for the final snapshot created before the cluster is deleted, if enabled.

global_cluster_identifier.description: The identifier of the global database cluster if this cluster is part of a global setup.

iam_database_authentication_enabled.description: Enables IAM database authentication for the cluster, allowing IAM users to authenticate.

iam_roles.description: A list of IAM roles to associate with the cluster for additional permissions.

kms_key_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key to encrypt the cluster's storage.

neptune_cluster_parameter_group_name.description: The name of the Neptune cluster parameter group to associate with the cluster.

neptune_instance_parameter_group_name.description: The name of the Neptune instance parameter group to associate with the instances in the cluster.

neptune_subnet_group_name.description: The name of the Neptune subnet group to associate with the cluster for network configuration.

port.description: The port number on which the database accepts connections. Must be valid for the engine type.

preferred_backup_window.description: The daily time range (in UTC) during which automated backups are created. Format: hh24:mi-hh24:mi.

preferred_maintenance_window.description: The weekly time range (in UTC) during which maintenance is performed. Format: ddd:hh24:mi-ddd:hh24:mi.

replication_source_identifier.description: The identifier of the source cluster to replicate from, if creating a read replica.

serverless_v2_scaling_configuration.description: Defines the scaling configuration for serverless v2 clusters, including optional min and max capacity.

skip_final_snapshot.description: Specifies whether to skip creating a final snapshot when the cluster is deleted.

snapshot_identifier.description: The identifier of an existing snapshot to restore when creating the cluster.

storage_encrypted.description: Indicates whether storage encryption is enabled for the cluster.

storage_type.description: Specifies the storage type to use for the cluster. Options vary by engine and region.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource for categorization or metadata purposes.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeouts for create, update, and delete operations. Specify durations in string format (e.g., 30m).

vpc_security_group_ids.description: A list of VPC security group IDs to associate with the cluster for network security.
